title: Fast food 3D
description: This resource pack replaces regular food with fast food
body:
## This resource pack transforms food in Minecraft, replacing it with various delicious dishes from **fast food** restaurants.

This resource pack modifies the backed potato and different types of cooked meat, such as:

- Cooked beef
- Cooked mutton
- Cooked porkchop
- Cooked chicken
- And more:)

### INSTALLATION:

1. Download this resource pack.
2. Move the .zip file to your resourcepacks folder.
3. Launch Minecraft and select the resource pack in the settings menu.
